questions.question: What is the primary test for deciding whether expenditure is appropriate in the public service?
questions.questionHtml: What is the primary test for deciding whether expenditure is appropriate in the public service?

answers.text: Whether it is within the approved budget
answers.textHtml: Whether it is within the approved budget

answers.text: Whether a reasonable member of the public would consider it a good use of public money
answers.textHtml: Whether a reasonable member of the public would consider it a good use of public money

answers.text: Whether your manager has approved it
Whether a similar private sector organisation would spend the same amount
answers.textHtml: Whether a similar private sector organisation would spend the same amount

questions.feedback: The primary test is the 'reasonable person' test: would a reasonable member of the public consider this a good use of public money? Being within budget or having manager approval does not automatically make expenditure appropriate — you also need to consider whether it looks appropriate from the public's perspective.
questions.feedbackHtml: The primary test is the 'reasonable person' test: would a reasonable member of the public consider this a good use of public money? Being within budget or having manager approval does not automatically make expenditure appropriate — you also need to consider whether it looks appropriate from the public's perspective.

questions.question: A public servant is flying to an official overseas meeting. What class of travel should they book by default?
questions.questionHtml: A public servant is flying to an official overseas meeting. What class of travel should they book by default?

answers.text: Business class, to ensure they arrive refreshed and productive
answers.textHtml: Business class, to ensure they arrive refreshed and productive

answers.text: Economy class, unless there is specific justification for a higher class
answers.textHtml: Economy class, unless there is specific justification for a higher class

answers.text: Premium economy as a standard compromise
Whatever class their manager uses

questions.feedback: Economy class is the default for all public servants, regardless of seniority. Business class may be approved in specific circumstances — such as very long overnight flights or for medical reasons — but it requires specific justification. The fact that colleagues or managers travel business class does not justify doing the same.
questions.feedbackHtml: Economy class is the default for all public servants, regardless of seniority. Business class may be approved in specific circumstances — such as very long overnight flights or for medical reasons — but it requires specific justification. The fact that colleagues or managers travel business class does not justify doing the same.

questions.question: Select ALL that apply: Which of the following actions are required when incurring sensitive expenditure?
questions.questionHtml: Select ALL that apply: Which of the following actions are required when incurring sensitive expenditure?

answers.text: Obtain prior authorisation where required
Keep receipts and documentation
Record the business purpose
Post about it on social media to demonstrate transparency
answers.textHtml: Post about it on social media to demonstrate transparency

answers.text: Ensure it represents value for money

questions.feedback: When incurring sensitive expenditure, you must obtain prior authorisation, keep receipts and documentation, record the business purpose, and ensure it represents value for money. Posting on social media is not a transparency requirement and could create other issues.
questions.feedbackHtml: When incurring sensitive expenditure, you must obtain prior authorisation, keep receipts and documentation, record the business purpose, and ensure it represents value for money. Posting on social media is not a transparency requirement and could create other issues.

questions.question: A public servant accidentally uses their government credit card to pay for personal groceries. What should they do?
questions.questionHtml: A public servant accidentally uses their government credit card to pay for personal groceries. What should they do?

answers.text: Say nothing and hope it goes unnoticed during reconciliation
answers.textHtml: Say nothing and hope it goes unnoticed during reconciliation

answers.text: Report the error to their manager immediately and arrange to repay the amount
answers.textHtml: Report the error to their manager immediately and arrange to repay the amount

answers.text: Make a future official purchase to offset the personal one
answers.textHtml: Make a future official purchase to offset the personal one

answers.text: Wait until the next card reconciliation to sort it out
answers.textHtml: Wait until the next card reconciliation to sort it out

questions.feedback: Honest and prompt reporting is the right response to any credit card error. The public servant should immediately tell their manager what happened and follow the agency's process for repayment. Concealing the error, delaying, or trying to offset it with future purchases are all inappropriate responses that could make the situation much worse.
questions.feedbackHtml: Honest and prompt reporting is the right response to any credit card error. The public servant should immediately tell their manager what happened and follow the agency's process for repayment. Concealing the error, delaying, or trying to offset it with future purchases are all inappropriate responses that could make the situation much worse.

questions.question: Match each category of sensitive expenditure to its key rule:
questions.questionHtml: Match each category of sensitive expenditure to its key rule:

answers.text: Hospitality
answers.matchText: Must have a genuine business purpose and be proportionate
answers.matchTextHtml: Must have a genuine business purpose and be proportionate

answers.text: International travel
answers.matchText: Economy class is the default; higher class requires specific justification
answers.matchTextHtml: Economy class is the default; higher class requires specific justification

answers.text: Government credit cards
answers.matchText: Must only be used for approved business purposes — no personal use
answers.matchTextHtml: Must only be used for approved business purposes — no personal use

answers.text: Gifts received in official capacity
answers.matchText: Must be declared and handled according to agency policy
answers.matchTextHtml: Must be declared and handled according to agency policy

questions.feedback: Each category of sensitive expenditure has its own key rules: hospitality must have a business purpose; international travel defaults to economy class; government credit cards are for business purposes only; and gifts received in an official capacity must be declared and handled per policy.
questions.feedbackHtml: Each category of sensitive expenditure has its own key rules: hospitality must have a business purpose; international travel defaults to economy class; government credit cards are for business purposes only; and gifts received in an official capacity must be declared and handled per policy.
